message: My AuroraBook shipped three days late and the box arrived crushed. The laptop still powers on but the charger was missing from the package. I need the charger sent to me right away, this is really frustrating.
I was charged twice for the same order of PulseBuds on my credit card. Please refund the duplicate charge as soon as possible.
Absolutely love this machine. Setup was smooth and the screen is gorgeous. Just wanted to say thank you, best purchase I have made all year.
The tablet screen started flickering and then went completely black after two weeks. It is clearly defective and I want a replacement under warranty.
I cannot log into my account to track my order. The password reset email never arrives and I have tried three times.
My order has been stuck in processing for over a week with no tracking number. Where is my laptop? I need it for work and nobody has responded.
Quick question, does the SkyTab Mini support the stylus that came with the larger model? Not a complaint, just want to know before I buy accessories.
The right earbud stopped charging after only ten days. This is a defective unit and I expect a full refund, not a store credit.
I was promised free next day shipping at checkout but I got charged a shipping fee anyway. Please remove the fee from my invoice.
Everything works perfectly and delivery was two days early. Great service, I will definitely be recommending you to my friends.
My account shows an order I never placed and my saved card was charged. I am worried my account has been compromised and I need help locking it down.
The delivery was left in the rain and the packaging was soaked. The laptop seems fine but I am upset about how carelessly it was handled during shipping.
